purchase_paths.canonical_product_name: PiACTIVE ORIGINAL DEET FREE Insect Repellent Lotion 12HR! – 120ml
positives: Provides up to 12 hours of protection against mosquitoes, ticks, and black flies.
Non-scented, non-greasy, and gentle on the skin.
Suitable for children aged 6 months and older.
Won't damage plastics or synthetic materials.
Contains 20% Icaridin for effective insect repelling.
negatives: Some retailers list the product as a 120g cream, which may be a typographical error.
Availability may vary by retailer and location.
Price points differ across retailers, which may affect purchasing decisions.
Some retailers may not offer online purchasing options.
Limited availability in certain regions may require in-store visits.

positives: Plant-based, DEET-free formula
Provides up to 6 hours of mosquito protection
Safe for people, pets, and the environment
negatives: Limited availability in major retailers
Higher price point compared to some alternatives
Not available in smaller sizes

positives: DEET-free formula with 20% Icaridin for effective mosquito and tick protection
Provides up to 12 hours of protection from mosquito and tick bites, and 10 hours against black flies
Eco-friendly packaging with Bag on Valve (BOV) technology, eliminating the use of hydrocarbon propellants
Pleasant scent and non-greasy application suitable for all skin types
Made in Canada, ensuring quality and supporting local businesses
negatives: Limited availability in major retailers like Best Buy Canada, Walmart Canada, and Amazon.ca
Some retailers may have higher prices compared to others
Not suitable for individuals with known sensitivities to Icaridin or other insect repellent ingredients

purchase_paths.canonical_product_name: Druide Mosquito Repellent – Lemon Eucalyptus – 250 ml
positives: Natural, plant-based ingredients without synthetic chemicals like DEET
Provides up to 6 hours of protection against various biting insects
Biodegradable and eco-friendly formula
Hypoallergenic and suitable for sensitive skin
Pleasant lemon eucalyptus scent
negatives: Higher price point compared to some chemical-based repellents
Limited availability in some regions
May require reapplication after 6 hours for continuous protection
Not suitable for children under 3 years old
Effectiveness may vary based on individual skin chemistry and environmental conditions

canadian_brands.notes: Aspectek is a Vancouver-based company specializing in pest control products, including mosquito gear. While headquartered in Canada, their products are manufactured elsewhere.

canadian_brands.top_product: PiACTIVE ORIGINAL DEET FREE Insect Repellent Lotion 12HR! – 120ml
canadian_brands.notes: PiACTIVE is 100% Canadian owned and operated, manufactured and distributed by KUUS Inc headquartered in Toronto.
Mosquito Shield is a 100% Canadian owned and operated brand by KUUS Inc, headquartered in Toronto since 2003.
PureGard, formerly AtlanTick, is a majority Indigenous Women-owned company that manufactures natural botanical insect repellents in Nova Scotia.
Doktor Doom’s Jungle Juice is produced by Inovago Inc, headquartered in Stanstead, Quebec, and is made in Canada.

canadian_brands.top_product: Druide Mosquito Repellent – Lemon Eucalyptus – 250 ml
canadian_brands.notes: Druide is a Quebec-based company manufacturing organic insect repellents in Pointe-Claire, Quebec.
Citrobug Natural Mosquito Repellent is produced by Lagoon Baby, a Canadian company based in Maple Ridge, BC.
